soldiers_strike.name: Soldier's Strike
soldiers_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A disciplined, basic strike. Generates 20 Stamina and 1 Order Pip.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Setup: Slam your shield into the foe. Generates 1 Order Pip and stuns for 1 tick.

phalanx_thrust.name: Phalanx Thrust
phalanx_thrust.description: Payoff: A powerful thrust from behind a shield. Consumes 5 Order Pips to deal massive Physical damage.

disciplined_volley.name: Disciplined Volley
disciplined_volley.description: Payoff/AOE: Signal a volley of support fire. Consumes 3 Order Pips to deal AOE damage in the room.

defensive_hunker.name: Defensive Hunker
defensive_hunker.description: Defense: Lower your center of gravity. Reduces incoming Physical damage by 50% but prevents movement.

tactical_retreat.name: Tactical Retreat
tactical_retreat.description: Defense/Mobility: Back away while maintaining defense. Moves you to an adjacent room and grants [Shielded].

marching_pace.name: Marching Pace
marching_pace.description: Mobility: Increase the pace of your group. All allies in the room gain [Haste] for 4 ticks.

rally_the_troops.name: Rally the Troops
rally_the_troops.description: Utility/Signature: For 15 ticks, all allies in the room regenerate 10% HP per tick.

soldier_physiology.name: Soldier Physiology
soldier_physiology.description: Passive: Combat Veteran. You gain 10% bonus damage and 10% damage reduction for every ally present in the same room.
